title: Trouble Diagnosis — Line Pressure Solenoid Circuit Check (Cont'd)

figures_detected.description: Diagram B: Illustration showing a driver depressing the brake pedal in a vehicle, with N-CVT C/U connected to connector pin 19, and a voltmeter measuring voltage at that pin.

nodes.text: Perform self diagnosis after test drive

• Check N-CVT control unit I/O signal
• Re-check N-CVT control unit pin terminals for damage or incorrect connection of control unit harness connector

model_notes: Applies to N-CVT (Nissan Continuously Variable Transmission) equipped models. Diagram B references connector pin 19 of N-CVT C/U with connector connected.
